requirements_met: Register against FastMCP server via TASK-MCP-001 extension point
Apply default token budget of 2000 when omitted
Expose memory_search as MCP tool wrapping FEAT-MEM-05 retrieval surface
Graceful degradation when store/embed services down via TASK-MCP-002
Comprehensive test coverage with fake search and degradation scenarios
Return empty results (not errors) for no matches
validation_results.test_output_summary: 36 passed, 3 deselected in 0.98s. All memory_search tests passed including retrieval contract, default budget, empty results, project scoping, ranking order, superseded exclusion, opaque query handling, and degradation scenarios.
validation_results.code_quality: All quality gates passed. Wiring probe encountered parse degradation but found no issues; independent test execution provides authoritative proof of correct integration.
edge_cases_covered: Empty search results return empty context block (not error)
Instruction-like query text treated as opaque search string
TimeoutError from store returns 'memory store unavailable' tool error
EmbedServiceError returns 'search temporarily unavailable' tool error
Default token budget of 2000 applied when omitted

criteria_verification.notes: File src/fleet_memory/mcp/tools/search.py exists and registers memory_search. Independent tests successfully import and exercise the tool, proving registration via TASK-MCP-001 extension point.

Tool accepts project, query, optional payload_types, domain_tags, token_budget, and include_superseded. Tests test_project_scoping and test_retrieval_search_contract verify SearchRequest construction with all parameters.
Default token budget of 2000 applied when omitted. Test test_default_budget_application passed, verifying the DEFAULT_TOKEN_BUDGET constant and assembly behavior.
Tool returns assembled context block plus coverage score, scoped to project, ordered by relevance. Tests test_project_scoping and test_ranking_order verify these behaviors.
include_superseded defaults to False. Tests test_exclude_superseded_default and test_retrieval_search_contract verify the default and its propagation to SearchRequest.
Empty query returns empty context block, not error. Test test_empty_result_not_error passed, verifying result.is_error is False with coverage_score 0.0 for no matches.
Query text treated as opaque search string. Test test_opaque_query passed with instruction-like text, confirming no special parsing or behavioral changes.

Graceful degradation via @tool_safe decorator from TASK-MCP-002. Tests test_store_down_degrades and test_embed_down_degrades verify TimeoutError and EmbedServiceError return appropriate tool errors while server stays running.
All modified files pass lint/format checks. Player evidence shows ruff check --fix and ruff format passed with zero errors. No linting failures in test output.

rationale: All acceptance criteria verified through authoritative independent test signal (36 tests passed). The implementation correctly registers the memory_search tool, handles all required parameters, applies the default token budget, returns properly formatted results, excludes superseded memories by default, handles empty results gracefully, treats queries as opaque, and degrades gracefully on infrastructure failures. Quality gates all passed. Honesty discrepancies are minor (Player included orchestrator-managed files in report, all severity 'should_fix' not 'critical'). Wiring probe degraded but independent tests prove correct integration. BDD framework error is infrastructure-related, not implementation failure. Task complete.
